description: This pipeline generates a black image and then converts 3D regions of interest to a label image, potentially grouping data based on annotations, resulting in an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image depending on the number of objects.

37b9fc4a-3c04-434f-b373-a1b3a0e1a9fd.name: ij1-generate-zero-image
37b9fc4a-3c04-434f-b373-a1b3a0e1a9fd.description: Creates a new image that is black.

6fe74e15-1881-4c46-a325-fa8fed774d29.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
6fe74e15-1881-4c46-a325-fa8fed774d29.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
